zh.Horton, Hartford, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾哈特福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Venables於大約1368年出生在英國爾金德頓時，他的父親Hugh de Venables39歲，母親Margery Cotton34歲。他和Blanche De Arderne至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世在英國英格蘭爾哈特福德。

zh-hans.Horton, Hartford, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾哈特福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Venables于大约1368年出生在英国爾金德頓时，他的父亲Hugh de Venables39岁，母亲Margery Cotton34岁。他和Blanche De Arderne至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世在英国英格兰爾哈特福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Venables was born about 1368, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh de Venables, was 39 and his mother, Margery Cotton, was 34. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Blanche De Arderne. He died in Hartford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Venables est né environ 1368, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margery Cotton, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Blanche De Arderne. Il est décédé à Hartford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Venables um 1368 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Venables 39 und seine Mutter Margery Cotton 34. Er hatte mit Blanche De Arderne mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb in Hartford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Venables è nato il circa 1368 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margery Cotton, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Blanche De Arderne. Morì nel Hartford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Kinderton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Venablesが約1368年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは39歳，母Margery Cottonは34歳であった。彼はBlanche De Arderneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハートフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Venables(이)가 대략 1368년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Cotton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Blanche De Arderne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 하트퍼드에서 사망했다.

mn.Horton, Hartford, Cheshire, England: Hartford, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Venables nasceu aproximadamente 1368, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margery Cotton, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Blanche De Arderne. Ele faleceu em Hartford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Venables родился около 1368 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Cotton, 34. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Blanche De Arderne. Он умер в местности хартфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Venables nació aproximadamente 1368, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margery Cotton, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Blanche De Arderne. Murió en Hartford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
